tasks.title: Harness review — human checkpoint
tasks.description: Review CLAUDE.md and .github/copilot-instructions.md. Confirm all [PLACEHOLDER] tokens are filled. Confirm docs/specs/ and tests/ folders exist. Set status to done when ready.
tasks.notes: Approved by human 2026-06-10. Stack: C#/WPF/.NET 10, dotnet test. Also approved new top-level src/ folder and ADR-0001 (Windows Credential Manager).

tasks.title: Scaffold .NET solution
tasks.description: Create AgentSubscriptionTracker.sln, src/AgentSubscriptionTracker.App (WPF, net10.0-windows, nullable enabled) and tests/AgentSubscriptionTracker.Tests (xUnit) with project reference. Add .NET .gitignore. dotnet build must pass.
tasks.notes: No business logic — skeleton only, so spec writers have a tests project to target.

tasks.title: Spec: Claude usage service
tasks.description: SPEC-0001: read Claude Code OAuth credentials from local store (existence/struct only, never log token), query the subscription usage endpoint powering /usage, map to a UsageSnapshot model (session/weekly limits, percent used, reset times). Include failing test stubs and acceptance criteria checklist.
tasks.notes: Endpoint details verified by research phase before spec is written. Spec + failing stubs landed 2026-06-10.

tasks.title: Spec: Copilot quota service
tasks.description: SPEC-0002: discover locally stored GitHub Copilot OAuth token (apps.json/hosts.json), query internal quota endpoint (quota snapshots: chat, completions, premium interactions, reset date), map to QuotaSnapshot model. Include failing test stubs and acceptance criteria checklist.
tasks.notes: Endpoint details verified by research phase before spec is written. Spec + failing stubs landed 2026-06-10.

tasks.title: Spec: tray icon + tooltip callout UI
tasks.description: SPEC-0003: Shell_NotifyIcon tray icon, mouseover opens a styled borderless WPF popup callout showing both providers' limits with progress bars; refresh on hover with cached fallback; context menu (refresh/settings/exit). Include failing test stubs for the view-model and acceptance criteria checklist.

tasks.title: Code: Claude usage service
tasks.description: Implement SPEC-0001 in src/AgentSubscriptionTracker.App/Services/. All SPEC-0001 tests green.
tasks.notes: Implemented 2026-06-10; 37/37 SPEC-0001 tests green. Closed 2026-06-11 after ADR-0002 (refresh-host allowlist) landed.

tasks.title: Code: Copilot quota service
tasks.description: Implement SPEC-0002 in src/AgentSubscriptionTracker.App/Services/. All SPEC-0002 tests green.
tasks.notes: Verified 2026-06-11: all 30 Tests.Copilot tests green (CopilotQuotaService, CopilotTokenProvider, WindowsCredentialStore implemented; docs/COPILOT_SETUP.md present).

tasks.title: Code: tray icon + tooltip callout UI
tasks.description: Implement SPEC-0003 (tray icon, WPF callout, view-models, refresh orchestration) wiring in both services. All tests green.
tasks.notes: Done 2026-06-11: view-models (152/152 tests green) + shell (TrayIconHost/CalloutController/ThemeDetector/CalloutWindow/themes/manifest/icon). Smoke test: app runs, single instance enforced. Start-with-Windows deferred per spec (v1-optional).

tasks.title: Test: full suite + build verification
tasks.description: dotnet build and dotnet test for the entire solution must pass green. Record results in memory.md.
tasks.notes: 2026-06-11: dotnet build 0 warnings/0 errors; dotnet test 152/152 passed. Recorded in memory.md.

tasks.title: Review: correctness, secret hygiene, spec compliance
tasks.description: Adversarial review of the implementation against SPEC-0001..0003 acceptance criteria, the CLAUDE.md deny list (no secrets read/written to files or logs), and WPF threading correctness. Critical findings must be fixed before done.
tasks.notes: 2026-06-11: hygiene sweeps clean (no TLS relaxation, no console/debug logging, no DateTime.Now in src, fixtures fake-token only). All three spec checklists verified. One finding FIXED: TrayIconHost.Dispose could touch thread-affine HwndSource from the ProcessExit worker thread — now NIM_DELETE always runs, window teardown only on its dispatcher thread. 152/152 green after fix.

tasks.title: Final acceptance — human checkpoint
tasks.description: Human runs the app, hovers the tray icon, verifies the callout shows live Claude and Copilot data. Set to done to close the milestone.
tasks.last_error: 2026-06-11 human test: Claude showed 'temporarily unavailable' (expired token's OAuth refresh exceeded the 2 s hover budget and was cancelled+mislabeled), Copilot showed 'Not signed in' (2026 Copilot CLI stores no plaintext token; only gh CLI keyring present), and the callout had no commands (Exit only via hard-to-reach context menu).
tasks.notes: Findings spawned TASK-012 (fixes), TASK-013 (auth-config analysis), TASK-014 (re-acceptance).

tasks.title: Code: TASK-011 fixes — budget semantics, gh CLI token discovery, callout command row
tasks.description: Per SPEC-0002/0003 amendments 2026-06-11: (1) per-provider budget no longer cancels in-flight fetches — they publish on completion; (2) Copilot token discovery extended with gh CLI keyring (gh:github.com:) and %APPDATA%/GitHub CLI/hosts.yml; (3) callout footer gets Refresh + Exit buttons so the overlay alone operates the app. All tests green.
tasks.notes: Done 2026-06-11: 158/158 tests green (6 new: 4 gh-discovery, 2 budget semantics); dotnet build 0 warnings; smoke test incl. forced callout + live refresh passed. Sign-in messages now name 'gh auth login'.

tasks.title: Analysis: authentication configuration strategy (settings page?)
tasks.description: Evaluate whether a settings page for service authentication is needed, per TASK-011 human feedback. Outcome recorded as ADR.
tasks.notes: ADR-0003: no token-entry settings page (PATs don't work for copilot_internal; Claude usage is OAuth-only) — zero-config discovery extended instead, actionable sign-in messages in the callout, device-flow OAuth deferred, optional read-only connection-status panel as future scope.

tasks.title: Final acceptance (retry) — human checkpoint
tasks.description: Human runs the app and verifies: Claude section shows live usage (token auto-refresh may take a few seconds on first hover — data appears while the callout is open), Copilot section shows live quota via the gh CLI token, and the callout's Refresh/Exit buttons work without the context menu. Set to done to close the milestone.
